description_long: This object consists of two classic ring-shaped donuts, each with a thick, smooth layer of chocolate glaze covering the top half and a golden-brown, slightly matte dough base. The donuts are stacked in a casual, overlapping arrangement, suggesting a fresh, inviting presentation. The chocolate glaze appears even and glossy, with no visible toppings or decorations, and the dough has a soft, pillowy texture. The central holes are well-defined, and the edges of the glaze are slightly irregular, mimicking the look of real, hand-dipped donuts. There is no visible packaging or branding, and the donuts are unadorned, emphasizing their simple, appetizing appearance. The setting suggests they are ready to be served or displayed in an urban food context, such as a bakery, café, or street food stall.
description: Two golden-brown ring donuts with smooth chocolate glaze on top, stacked together with no visible toppings or packaging. The donuts have a soft, pillowy texture and a glossy finish on the chocolate.
description_view_0: Two donuts stacked with the front donut's chocolate glaze and dough clearly visible, showing the overlapping arrangement.
description_view_1: Top-down angle highlighting the smooth, glossy chocolate glaze and the central holes of both donuts.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the thickness of the chocolate glaze and the soft, golden-brown dough beneath.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the donut in the back standing upright, with the chocolate glaze and dough contrast visible.
attribute_icing_type: chocolate glaze; smooth, glossy, and evenly coated on the top half of each donut
attribute_placement_location: unwrapped and stacked together, with no visible surface or container
